trade_history.notes: Trailing stop triggered in May 12 broad market selloff (hot CPI shock). Estimated exit at ~$100.89 (5% trailing from May 11 high of $106.20). Stock had risen 7.24% from entry before reversal. Thesis was valid — Needham and TD Cowen raised PTs to $120 — but macro risk overwhelmed the position.

Closed due to broken thesis: position entered after 64% monthly run-up, fell 6.14% from entry exceeding 5% trailing stop. Korea semiconductor shockwave + hot CPI drove selloff. Nvidia competition in Windows processors is a structural threat. Negative earnings growth ahead at 20x forward P/E. Close order accepted (order_id: e0713796-0c72-41e1-beb5-a6b7380be724).
